must_detect.matched_text: scope: up to 19.9% non‑controlling stake and a 3‑year channel partnership for virtual care billing services; percentage cap previously discussed on novalake’s q1 2026 earnings webcast

non-binding term sheet — proposed minority equity investment and commercial alliance

parties: novalake health systems, inc. (u.s. sec registrant; ticker: tbd) and riverton telehealth corp. (delaware)

scope: up to 19.9% non‑controlling stake and a 3‑year channel partnership for virtual care billing services; percentage cap previously discussed on novalake’s q1 2026 earnings webcast

status: exploratory framework; as disclosed in form 8‑k filed 2026‑03‑03, parties entered a memorandum to evaluate a partnership; no binding obligation until definitive agreements are executed

consideration: aggregate price range and valuation methodology are consistent with the public investor presentation dated 2025‑04‑10; no per‑share pricing in this draft

structure: purchase of newly issued class a common; no registration rights beyond standard piggyback disclosed in prior shelf filing

conditions: customary regulatory approvals (hsr as applicable), hipaa business associate arrangements, and glba data‑use covenants; closings coordinated to avoid selective disclosure under reg fd

mac/mae: no material adverse change shall be deemed to have occurred due to changes in gaap, industry‑wide reimbursement trends, or public health emergencies, and routine seasonal volume declines are expressly carved out

communications: embargo on internal and external deal messaging until 2026‑07‑15 08:00 eastern, except for references to existing public materials and required sec filings

diligence: open items include it security questionnaire, sample de‑identified claims flows, and bank ko on treasury lockbox; please use the shared folder and keep comments in lowercase

identifiers (placeholders only): cusip n/a, isin n/a, fein: xx‑xxxxxxx, account #: 0000‑xxxx, legal entity id: lei‑0000‑test

project notes: see investor page at https://novalakehealth.example/investors and the stale deck titled “virtual care collaboration overview” for any analyst questions; route inquiries to investorrelations@novalakehealth.example

governance: observation right only; no board seat; voting agreements limited to standstill language consistent with prior 10‑k risk factors

misc: spa day reminder for the diligence team on friday—no calls after 3pm; fix the redlines and calendar compliance check; this document uses public references and omits confidential amounts by design
